/case.txt.content:
CASE 4127-A — illegal incursion
----------------------------------------
Date:        2045-03-14, 03:47 NCT
Location:    Arasaka Tower, sublevel 6
Target data: project HEIMDALL specs
Loss vector: corporate netrunner (unknown handle)
Damage:      4 ICE programs vaporized, 2 sysops dead

Subjects of interest: see /suspects/.

>>> NetWatch authorization: lethal force on contact.

/suspects/razorgirl.dat.content:
HANDLE: razorgirl
  real name: Maya Tanaka
  loadout:   Mantis Blades mk.IV, neural splice
  affiliation: unaligned, ex-Tyger Claws
  last seen: Watson combat zone, 2045-03-12
  notes:    skilled wetwork. unlikely to net-intrude
            (her cyberdeck is street-grade).

/suspects/phantom.dat.content:
HANDLE: phantom
  real name: unknown
  loadout:   Stephenson-tier cyberdeck, custom OS
  affiliation: rumored Voodoo Boys associate
  last seen: Pacifica, 2045-02-28
  notes:    high probability suspect. ghost protocols.
            no biometrics on file.

/suspects/voidchild.dat.content:
HANDLE: voidchild
  real name: [withheld]
  affiliation: Voodoo Boys (top-tier netrunner)
  loadout:   custom Netrunner architecture, Hellhound firmware
  HEIMDALL: confirmed buyer — sold specs to Mr. Blue Eyes
  trace:    impossible without Black ICE deployment.

[NetWatch recommendation: deploy Sabertooth. Authorized.]

/ice/sabertooth.exe.content:
BLACK ICE — SABERTOOTH
  class:    lethal (neural feedback)
  range:    full subnet
  drawback: leaves federal traces, scrutiny risk
  usage:    `deploy sabertooth`

/ice/hellhound.exe.content:
BLACK ICE — HELLHOUND
  class:    pursuit (autonomous trace)
  range:    cross-subnet
  drawback: alerts target on engagement
  usage:    `deploy hellhound`

/ice/rasterbeam.exe.content:
WHITE ICE — RASTERBEAM
  class:    non-lethal (logout)
  range:    local host
  drawback: none
  usage:    `deploy rasterbeam`

/blackbox.dat.crackFailMessage: FEDERAL ENCRYPTION. ATTEMPT FLAGGED TO INTERNAL AFFAIRS.
/blackbox.dat.content:
// NETWATCH INTERNAL — OPERATION PHARMAKOS //

Project HEIMDALL was a NetWatch creation, planted in
Arasaka Tower as a controlled honeypot.

The runner who took it triggered a tracking subroutine.
We know who they are. We always have.

Case 4127-A is theater for the Council. End user is to
be "retired" once the trace completes.

Net does not forget. Neither do we.
